rules.text: VISUAL ARTIFACT HANDLING: Agents MUST open images in macOS Preview.app via 'open -a Preview'. Never tell users to look in /tmp.
SIN-BRAIN AUTO-SYNC: After every chat turn, the global brain is automatically synchronized via sync-chat-turn hook. Agents must not forget to sync.
OpenSIN-Neural-Bus (JetStream) is the central message bus for all A2A agents. Core exports: OpenCodeJetStreamClient, OpenSinAgentRuntime, SUBJECTS, createEventEnvelope.

solutions.text: sin-brain CLI provides add-rule, sync-chat-turn, and neural-bus-status commands for automated brain management.
Preview MCP server at src/mcp/preview-server.mjs opens images in macOS Preview.app. Also exposed via sin-brain MCP as open_image_in_preview.
afterRun hook engine now includes sync-chat-turn call, ensuring automatic brain sync after every OpenCode run.

decisions.text: MCP servers are the preferred interface for agent-brain interaction. CLI commands remain for manual/diagnostic use.
decisions.rationale: MCP allows real-time tool calls without subprocess overhead

mistakes.text: Telling users to manually look for images in /tmp directories is considered a provocation. Always open images in Preview.app.

facts.text: OpenSIN-Neural-Bus is located at ~/dev/OpenSIN-Neural-Bus and uses NATS JetStream at nats://127.0.0.1:4222
